subject: Wednesday dinner
snippet: Bringing dinner Wednesday, does 6 still work?
body:
Hi Dad,

Planning to bring dinner over Wednesday around 6. Let me know if that still works.

Karen

subject: Your upcoming visit
snippet: A friendly reminder about your upcoming appointment.
body:
Dear Patient,

This is a reminder about your upcoming visit with our office. Please bring any home readings your provider has asked you to track.

Westside Diabetes & Endocrine Clinic

subject: Sunday call
snippet: Talk Sunday at the usual time?
body:
Hey Dad,

Usual time Sunday? Got a 16k long run in this week, felt good.

Kevin
